about.title: About Finmora
about.subtitle: Making investment simple, transparent, and accessible for everyone.

sections.title: Our Mission
sections.content: Finmora was built to solve a simple problem: investing shouldn't be complicated. We provide a complete platform where users can invest, track monthly income, earn referral rewards, and grow long-term wealth through SIP ? all in one place.

sections.title: What We Do
sections.content: We offer three investment tiers (Infinity Start, Grow, and Max), a transparent 5% referral program, automated SIP management, and a full admin system for platform operators. Businesses can also advertise to our active investor community.

sections.title: Our Values
sections.content:
Transparency ? every transaction and earning is visible in your dashboard.
Simplicity ? invest in minutes, not days.
Trust ? KYC verification, secure withdrawals, and admin oversight on every payout.
Growth ? referral income and SIP work together to build long-term wealth.

sections.title: Who We Serve
sections.content: Individual investors looking for monthly returns, network builders earning through referrals, businesses seeking ad visibility among finance-minded audiences, and platform administrators who need full control over users, withdrawals, and advertisements.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We're here to help. Reach out for support, partnerships, or general questions.

form.title: Send a Message
form.subtitle: Fill out the form and our team will respond within 24?48 hours.
form.name: Your Name
form.subject: Subject
form.success: Thank you! Your message has been received. We'll get back to you soon.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your information.

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect information you provide during registration (name, email, mobile number, referral code), KYC documents (identity verification), investment and transaction data, and usage information when you interact with our platform.

sections.title: How We Use Your Information
sections.content: Your data is used to operate your account, process investments and withdrawals, calculate referral commissions and SIP contributions, send SMS/email/push notifications about account activity, verify your identity (KYC), and improve our services.

sections.title: Data Sharing
sections.content: We do not sell your personal information. We may share data with payment processors, SMS/email service providers, and regulatory authorities when required by law. Advertisers on our platform do not receive your personal financial data.

sections.title: Data Security
sections.content: We implement industry-standard security measures including encrypted connections (HTTPS), secure password storage, and access controls. However, no system is 100% secure ? please use a strong password and keep your login credentials private.

sections.title: Your Rights
sections.content: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data by contacting support@finmora.in. KYC and transaction records may be retained as required by applicable financial regulations.

sections.title: Contact
sections.content: For privacy-related questions, email us at support@finmora.in.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using Finmora.

sections.title: Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By creating an account or using Finmora, you agree to these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, please do not use the platform.

sections.title: Eligibility
sections.content: You must be at least 18 years old and legally capable of entering financial agreements in your jurisdiction. A valid referral code is required for registration. KYC verification is mandatory before withdrawals.

sections.title: Investment Plans
sections.content: Finmora offers three investment tiers: Infinity Start (?10,000??99,000), Infinity Grow (?1,00,000??9,99,000), and Infinity Max (?10,00,000??1,00,00,000). Monthly ROI rates are displayed on the platform and may vary by plan. Past performance does not guarantee future returns.

sections.title: Referral Program
sections.content: Each user receives a unique referral code. When a referred user makes a deposit, the referrer earns 5% referral income. Referral income withdrawals are processed within 48 hours subject to admin approval. Fraudulent referral activity may result in account suspension.

sections.title: SIP & Withdrawals
sections.content: Users may allocate 30?50% of monthly income to SIP with lock periods of 1, 3, or 5 years. Monthly income withdrawals are allowed once every 30 days. All withdrawal requests are subject to admin review and KYC verification.

sections.title: Prohibited Activities
sections.content: Users may not create fake accounts, manipulate referral systems, provide false KYC documents, or use the platform for money laundering or illegal activities. Violations result in immediate account termination and forfeiture of pending payouts.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
sections.content: Finmora is provided "as is." We are not liable for investment losses, service interruptions, or third-party actions. Users invest at their own risk and should consult a financial advisor before making investment decisions.

sections.title: Changes to Terms
sections.content: We may update these terms at any time. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance. Material changes will be communicated via email or platform notification.
